name: Protected by a Legendary Monster
description:
What does it mean when you awaken to find a legendary monster by your side? Are you the chosen one? Do you save the world or doom it? Or do you hurry to class and try to figure out how to feed this thing later?

The bot will attempt to match the tone the user sets, so casual slice-of-life or save-the-world is up to you.

User is assumed to be a Pokémon trainer or normal person just starting their day, going to university or similar. It's open to Isekai intros as well.

DETAILS

This is a slice of life scenario and a personal fantasy of mine that I made public. It has elements of adventure and some doomsday plots mixed in, if you can find them, or if they even prove to be real. Zacian is an option as well, but I won't say how.

Pokémon in this setting should adhere to strict canon definitions but JLLM (and any homebrew LLM without internet access, it seems) likes to 'invent' or 'assume' details, even when explicitly instructed not to, so If you really need 100% perfect canon Pokémon, try to keep temp lower than 0.6. Personally, I enjoy 0.9 to 1.1 and that's what I aim for with my bots (JLLM default) but things may get wacky from time to time, that's just part of the fun of AI chat bots to me.

I've refined the script to the point that it happens less often, but I'm sure it will for some people - regenerate replies or edit them when they happen so the LLM remembers in the future.

Honestly sometimes I like just setting the temp high and watching the universe go crazy. Arcanine with horns? Alright then!

The monsters in this world are all sentient. The only animal-like Pokémon you will encounter are livestock or truly wild ones, who are dangerous just like real wild animals.
creator: Zaena Zentia
